data.name: Princess's Peak
data.detailed_description:
New game released


關於此遊戲

這是一款益智遊戲，通過猜拳來獲得角色，並與其進行互動遊戲。如果您對我們的產品感興趣，請關注我們的組動態：
根據左上角的剩餘張數猜測對方可能出的牌並擊敗他，獲得角色的碎片。當所有的碎片被集齊，將會獲得該角色。
難度會隨著遊戲的進行而提升。
購買DLC將解鎖更多精彩內容！

遊戲特色：
所有角色已經18歲以上
精美立繪
動態CG
7名不同風格美少女

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 256M
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

data.name: Princess's Peak
data.detailed_description:
New game released


About the Game

This is a puzzle game that incorporates guessing to get characters and interact with the characters.If you are interested in our products, please pay attention to our group news:
According to the remaining number of cards in the upper left corner, guess the card that your opponent will play and beat them to get the character tokens. Once all the tokens are obtained, the character will be unlocked.
The difficulty will increase as the game progresses

Game features:
All characters are 18+
Beautiful Art
Dynamic CGs
7 unique and different girls
